projects.title: RoD-TAL
projects.description: Benchmark for Romanian Driving License Exams. Features question-answering, dense legal retrieval, and multimodal reasoning.

projects.title: SeLeRoSa
projects.description: The first sentence-level Romanian satire detection dataset, addressing granular satire in news.

projects.title: Complex Word Identification
projects.description: Research on multilingual and multi-domain complex word identification and lexical simplification using Large Language Models.

publications.venue: Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: EACL 2026

publications.authors: CG Craciun, RA Smădu, DC Cercel, MC Cercel
